steps.name: Note card with title "Bulk delete note 1784220470136-d9dd3e-1" should be visible getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784220470136-d9dd3e-1' }).first()

Scroll into view getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784220470136-d9dd3e-1' }).first()
Dispatch "click" getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784220470136-d9dd3e-1' }).first().getByRole('checkbox', { includeHidden: true })

"Delete" action should show 3 selected notes getByTestId('selection-mode-delete')
Bulk delete dialog should be visible getByTestId('bulk-delete-dialog')

Accessibility scan on "Bulk Delete Dialog" should have no violations
Confirm button should be enabled after entering correct count getByTestId('bulk-delete-confirm')
Bulk delete dialog should be hidden after confirmation getByTestId('bulk-delete-dialog')
Deleted note "Bulk delete note 1784220470136-d9dd3e-1" is still visible in the left panel. getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784220470136-d9dd3e-1' }).first()
